arts.sum: Newcastle United host Brentford in the Carabao Cup this evening with a place in the semi-finals at stake. Eddie Howe’s side head into the clash in confident mood, after thrashing Leicester City 4-0 at St James’ Park at the weekend. arts.ttl: ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks
arts.sum: Last week, it was reported in Italy that Sandro Tonali could leave Newcastle United as something had broken in the relationship between the club and the midfielder. The Italian international’s agent Giuseppe Riso later insisted the player isn’t pushing to leave Newcastle United, and attempted to quell the rumours. The talk about Tonali hasn’t died The post ‘Sudden and radical’ turn of events sees efforts to sign Newcastle United player within weeks appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United present offer for January signing – Magpies moving concretely, need higher fee
arts.sum: Newcastle United are in the picture to sign Real Valladolid’s Juma Bah in the winter market. That’s according to Sportitalia, and they make it clear this is their own information about Newcastle. Real Valladolid took the 18-year-old on loan from Sierra Leone’s AIK Freetong in the summer. The centre-back has made 10 appearances this season The post Newcastle United present offer for January signing – Magpies moving concretely, need higher fee appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I told Newcastle United players to put 'friendships aside' during watershed team meeting
arts.sum: Bruno said: "We've spoken a lot as a team after the Brentford game. That is part of football and we will always do what is best for the club and the team because the most important thing is Newcastle United and being in the position to play our best football."

arts.ttl: Newcastle United kitman has players in stitches as he arrives for training dressed as Santa Claus
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe ordered Santa Claus into the team huddle at training on the eve of the Brentford game. Howe then told Stoker or 'Santa' to join the team huddle as the Magpies prepared for the clash against the Bees.

arts.ttl: Why is Sean Longstaff banned for Newcastle United's cup clash with Brentford?
arts.sum: Joelinton was the Newcastle United midfielder to pick up a booking and subsequent suspension in Saturday's win over Leicester City but it is team-mate Sean Longstaff who will sit out of Wednesday's Carabao Cup clash with Brentford. This, despite Longstaff picking up just two yellow cards in the Premier League - and four in all competitions - this season.
